# Project Overview

## Introduction

This project aims to build a better markdown editor.

- Achieve 100 daily active users
- Support three AI providers

scenarios.docAfter:
# Product Roadmap
## Q1 Goals



## Q2 Goals



## Q1 Goals
* Improve application response time by 20%.
* Optimize database queries for faster data retrieval.
* Refactor critical code paths to enhance overall system performance.
## Q2 Goals
* Implement new user authentication module.
* Develop real-time analytics dashboard.
* Integrate third-party payment gateway.
